title: trifolium repens
intro: Trifolium repens, also known as white clover, is a perennial legume plant with trifoliate leaves and small white or pink flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of white clover include reducing stress, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. White clover can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
